name: Lunalytics
compose:
name: slashnode-lunalytics
services:
  web:
    image: ksjaay/lunalytics:0.10.23
    container_name: lunalytics
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data-lunalytics_data:/app/data:rw
      - web_data-logs:/app/logs:rw
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8183:2308
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-lunalytics_data:
    name: slashnode-lunalytics_web_data-lunalytics_data
  web_data-logs:
    name: slashnode-lunalytics_web_data-logs
